name: lindakatcodes
html:
🌙
🧙‍♀️
lindakatcodes
🪄✨
css: .lkc-wrap { position: relative; width: 100%; height: 100%; background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 30%, #1a1030 0%, #0d0818 60%, #070510 100%); display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; overflow: hidden; font-family: Georgia, serif; box-sizing: border-box; } .lkc-stars span { position: absolute; width: 3px; height: 3px; border-radius: 50%; background: #fff; animation: lkc-twinkle 2.5s infinite ease-in-out; } .lkc-stars span:nth-child(1)  { top: 8%;  left: 12%; animation-delay: 0s;   width: 2px; height: 2px; background: #f9c8e0; } .lkc-stars span:nth-child(2)  { top: 15%; left: 80%; animation-delay: 0.4s; width: 3px; height: 3px; background: #c8e0f9; } .lkc-stars span:nth-child(3)  { top: 25%; left: 55%; animation-delay: 0.8s; width: 2px; height: 2px; background: #e0f9c8; } .lkc-stars span:nth-child(4)  { top: 5%;  left: 45%; animation-delay: 1.2s; width: 2px; height: 2px; background: #f9e0c8; } .lkc-stars span:nth-child(5)  { top: 35%; left: 90%; animation-delay: 0.3s; width: 2px; height: 2px; background: #e8c8f9; } .lkc-stars span:nth-child(6)  { top: 10%; left: 30%; animation-delay: 1.6s; width: 3px; height: 3px; background: #f9f0c8; } .lkc-stars span:nth-child(7)  { top: 20%; left: 70%; animation-delay: 2.0s; width: 2px; height: 2px; background: #c8f9f0; } .lkc-stars span:nth-child(8)  { top: 40%; left: 5%;  animation-delay: 0.6s; width: 2px; height: 2px; background: #f9c8d4; } .lkc-stars span:nth-child(9)  { top: 30%; left: 22%; animation-delay: 1.0s; width: 2px; height: 2px; background: #d4c8f9; } .lkc-stars span:nth-child(10) { top: 18%; left: 60%; animation-delay: 1.8s; width: 3px; height: 3px; background: #f9e8c8; } @keyframes lkc-twinkle { 0%, 100% { opacity: 0.2; transform: scale(1); } 50% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1.4); } } .lkc-moon { position: absolute; top: 5%; right: 8%; font-size: clamp(1.2rem, 4vw, 2rem); animation: lkc-float 4s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes lkc-float { 0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0); } 50% { transform: translateY(-6px); } } .lkc-hat { font-size: clamp(2rem, 7vw, 3.5rem); animation: lkc-float 3.5s ease-in-out infinite; animation-delay: 0.5s; margin-bottom: 4px; } .lkc-name { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: center; gap: 1px; padding: 6px 8px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-radius: 12px; backdrop-filter: blur(2px); } .lkc-name span { font-size: clamp(0.85rem, 2.8vw, 1.4rem); font-weight: bold; letter-spacing: 0.04em; animation: lkc-rainbow 6s linear infinite; text-shadow: 0 0 8px currentColor; } .lkc-name .l1  { color: #ffb3c6; animation-delay: 0s; } .lkc-name .l2  { color: #ffd6a5; animation-delay: 0.2s; } .lkc-name .l3  { color: #fdffb6; animation-delay: 0.4s; } .lkc-name .l4  { color: #caffbf; animation-delay: 0.6s; } .lkc-name .l5  { color: #9bf6ff; animation-delay: 0.8s; } .lkc-name .l6  { color: #a0c4ff; animation-delay: 1.0s; } .lkc-name .l7  { color: #bdb2ff; animation-delay: 1.2s; } .lkc-name .l8  { color: #ffc6ff; animation-delay: 1.4s; } .lkc-name .l9  { color: #ffb3c6; animation-delay: 1.6s; } .lkc-name .l10 { color: #ffd6a5; animation-delay: 1.8s; } .lkc-name .l11 { color: #fdffb6; animation-delay: 2.0s; } .lkc-name .l12 { color: #caffbf; animation-delay: 2.2s; } .lkc-name .l13 { color: #9bf6ff; animation-delay: 2.4s; } @keyframes lkc-rainbow { 0%   { filter: brightness(1) hue-rotate(0deg); } 50%  { filter: brightness(1.3) hue-rotate(40deg); } 100% { filter: brightness(1) hue-rotate(0deg); } } .lkc-cauldron { margin-top: 6px; font-size: clamp(1rem, 3.5vw, 1.6rem); animation: lkc-sparkle 2s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes lkc-sparkle { 0%, 100% { opacity: 0.7; transform: scale(1) rotate(-3deg); } 50% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1.1) rotate(3deg); } }
